title: Fire Safety Remediation Survey (FRS) non-submitter list (2024/25 Q4)
body: "The private registered providers (PRP) below did not submit a valid[footnote 1] Fire Safety Remediation Survey (FRS) in 2024/5 Quarter 4 within the timeframes required for inclusion within our analysis and statistics production. These providers were all registered with the Regulator of Social Housing on the 31 March 2025 (the date to which the FRS relates) and on the 26 June 2025 (the date of publication).  This information is provided in the interest of transparency to assist users of the data in understanding the extent of non-submission in the FRS for the purposes of analysis.  The response rate in 2024/5 Quarter 4 was 99%, with all PRPs owning 1,000 or more units and all local authority registered providers submitting a return.     Provider code Provider name     4665 Sterling Housing Association Limited   4667 Keyworkers Housing Association Limited   A0811 Calverton Almshouses Charity   A3246 Wrott and Hill Charity   A3469 Richard Whitaker’s Almshouses   A4407 The Jane Maddock Homes   C3770 Isis Housing Co-operative Limited   H3824 The Abbeyfield Dorcas Society Limited   L1812 Redditch Friends Housing Association Limited          FRS submissions that were deemed to have significant errors, and where the provider did not respond or resolve queries raised in relation to these errors during the cleaning process, are not included in the final statistics. ↩    "
